scripts.dev: npm run build -w shared && concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,magenta "tsx watch backend/src/index.ts" "npm run dev -w frontend"
scripts.demo: npm run build -w shared && concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,magenta "tsx watch backend/src/index.ts --demo" "npm run dev -w frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w shared && npm run build -w frontend && npm run build -w backend
scripts.test: npm run build -w shared && npm run test -w backend
